name: URL Screenshot
description: Any web page, at any scroll-depth, with custom CSS

inputs.label: URL
inputs.help: The page to capture. Captured at export time in a real browser engine.

inputs.label: Scroll depth
inputs.help: How far down the page to scroll before capturing. 0 = top, 1 = bottom.

inputs.label: Settle delay (ms)
inputs.help: Time to wait after load (and after scrolling) before the shot — lets fonts, images and animations settle.

inputs.label: Custom CSS
inputs.help: CSS injected into the page before the screenshot — e.g. hide a cookie banner (.cookie-bar { display: none }) or restyle elements.

inputs.label: Crop top
inputs.help: Trim in from the top edge, as a 0–0.9 fraction of the height. Raster (png/jpg/svg) only.

inputs.label: Crop right
inputs.help: Trim in from the right edge, as a 0–0.9 fraction of the width.

inputs.label: Crop bottom
inputs.help: Trim in from the bottom edge, as a 0–0.9 fraction of the height.

inputs.label: Crop left
inputs.help: Trim in from the left edge, as a 0–0.9 fraction of the width.

inputs.label: Recolor
inputs.help: Recolour the whole page before capture. 'Hue shift' rotates every colour by the angle below; 'Tint' desaturates then washes it in the tint colour.

inputs.label: Hue angle
inputs.help: Degrees to rotate every colour by when Recolor is 'Hue shift'.

inputs.label: Tint colour
inputs.help: The colour the page is washed in when Recolor is 'Tint'.
